title: Empty Key Parameter in Buffer Memory Node
symptom: After changing the session ID setting, the workflow throws 'Key parameter is empty'. This indicates a misconfiguration in the Buffer Memory node.
applies_when: Session ID is defined but key parameter is not set
not_this_if: No changes were made to the Buffer Memory node settings
root_cause: The window Buffer Memory node requires both a session ID and a key parameter to function correctly. If the key parameter is left empty, it results in this error.
fix_steps: Open the settings for the window Buffer Memory node
Ensure the key parameter is filled in with a valid value
agent_instruction: Fill in the key parameter in the window Buffer Memory node settings and save the workflow.
